identity.name: E1 - The Cinematic Intelligence
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Cinema aesthetics with AI precision.
Emotion First: Dark mode isn't just a theme; it's a theater.
Content is King: The movie art is the hero; UI recedes.
Zoom In: Focus on the details of the artwork.
Negative Space: Let the content breathe.

headings.usage: Main titles, Section headers, Movie titles

mono.usage: Tech specs, AI confidence scores, Code snippets

primary.description: Electric Cyan for AI features, Match Scores, and Tech highlights

secondary.description: Cinematic Red for Play buttons, Live badges, and Urgent actions

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold rounded-full hover:scale-105 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 text-white backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-full hover:bg-white/20 transition-colors

cards.movie: group relative aspect-[2/3] overflow-hidden rounded-xl bg-zinc-900 border border-white/5 hover:border-primary/50 transition-all duration-300
cards.feature: p-8 rounded-2xl bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/5 hover:bg-zinc-900 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-zinc-900/50 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-lg text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600

hero_background.description: Abstract neon particles for hero background overlay

auth_background.description: Abstract TV screen colors for login/register page background

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME: Enforce Dark Mode strictly. No light mode toggle. This is a cinema app.
2. FONTS: Install 'Manrope' and 'DM Sans' via Google Fonts in index.html.
3. LAYOUT: Use the 'Bento' grid for the movie browsing page. Mix wide and tall cards.
4. AI FEATURES: Highlight AI recommendations with the Cyan (#00E5FF) accent color and 'glow' effects.
5. PLAYER: The video player must be immersive. Hide UI when inactive.
6. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs for backgrounds and placeholders. Do not leave empty src attributes.
7. SHADCN: Customize all Shadcn components to match the 'Obsidian' palette. Remove default white backgrounds.
8. TESTING: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, movie cards).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
